step1.title: Step 1 — Check Brand Name Availability
step1.description: Enter your desired brand name. This will appear as the Caller ID (CLI) when your employees make calls. Must be 18 characters, letters and numbers only.
step1.label: Enter your preferred Brand Name
step1.hint: 3 to 18 characters — letters and numbers only. No special symbols.
step1.available: '{{name}}' is available! Please proceed to submit your brand name request below.
step1.invalidFormat: Brand name must be 3–18 characters and contain letters and numbers only.
step1.unavailable: '{{name}}' is not available. Please try another name.
step1.notEligible: Brand Name purchases require an active NameTAG. Please link a NameTAG to your primary account to continue.
step1.notEligibleRecurring: You are not eligible to buy Brand Name. Please pay your recurring fee first.

restrictedKeywords.title: View restricted keywords before you apply
restrictedKeywords.subtitle: Check this list to avoid an instant rejection

step2.title: Step 2 — Submit Brand Name Request
step2.description: Confirm the number of employee numbers (callers) you want to link with this Brand Name Call. You can add or remove numbers after activation.
step2.callersLabel: Number of Callers / Accounts to link
step2.corpTagCount: Your account has {{count}} corporate NameTAG(s). You can link up to {{count}} caller(s).
step2.callersNote: Each caller number must be an active Ethio Telecom number registered with the NameTAG service.
step2.planHint: Choose how often the recurring fee is billed.
approvalPoints: Your request will be reviewed by our admin team based on your company profile and submitted documents.
You will receive an SMS notification once your request is approved.
After receiving the SMS, proceed to payment to activate your Brand Name Call service.
Your Brand Name Call service will be activated immediately after successful payment.
step2.disclaimer: By submitting this request, you confirm that the brand name complies with Ethio Telecom policies and does not infringe on any trademark or intellectual property rights. NameTAG reserves the right to reject any request that does not meet our guidelines.

step3.title: Step 3 — Approval from Admin
step3.description: Your brand name request has been submitted and is pending admin review.
step3.pendingMessage: We are reviewing your request for "{{name}}". You will receive an SMS notification within 24 to 48 hours once approved.

step4.title: Step 4 — Payment Processing
step4.description: Complete payment to activate your Brand Name Call service.
step4.pendingMessage: Payment will be available once your request is approved.

step5.title: Step 5 — Set Callers & Manage Brand Name
step5.description: Add caller numbers and manage your Brand Name Call service.
step5.pendingMessage: You will be able to manage callers after payment is completed.

hero.title: Brand Name Call — service introduction
hero.description: Before applying, please read this guide carefully. It explains what Brand Name Call is, how the approval process works, and what brand names are not permitted on the NameTAG platform.

items.text: Letters (A–Z) and numbers (0–9) only — no spaces, hyphens, or special characters.
Must relate to your registered company trade name or a translation of it.
Must not already be registered by another company on NameTAG.
Do not use look-alike characters to mimic another brand — e.g. "S0NY" using digit zero instead of letter O.
Do not mix character scripts — e.g. Latin and Cyrillic letters in the same name.
Names that differ by only 1–2 characters from an existing registered brand will be held for manual review.

restrictedKeywords.title: Restricted & blocked brand name keywords
restrictedKeywords.subtitle: Representative examples — the full restricted list applies at review.
restrictedKeywords.licensedNote: Licensed entities (banks, hospitals, etc.) can still submit — their application will be flagged for manual review and document verification.

reviewProcess.title: What happens during admin review?
steps: Company profile and trade documents are verified against the requested brand name.
Admin checks the name against trademark records and reserved lists.
If approved, a custom price may be set based on brand value and length.
You receive an SMS to complete payment and activation.

intro.ctaButton: I understand — apply for a brand name

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe Brand Name Call
unsubscribe.blockedWarning: You have {{count}} linked caller(s). You must remove all linked callers before you can unsubscribe from the Brand Name Call service. Use the "Remove" button next to each caller above, then return here to unsubscribe.
unsubscribe.description: Unsubscribing will stop your brand name from appearing as the caller ID on all calls. This action cannot be undone. Your subscription reference will be stored for record-keeping.

pending.title: Your Brand Name request is pending approval
pending.reviewTimeDesc: Your request is currently being reviewed by the NameTAG Admin team against your company profile and uploaded documents. You will receive an SMS on your primary mobile number once a decision has been made.
pending.noteText: You can only have one active Brand Name request at a time. If you wish to apply for a different brand name, you must first cancel this request.
pending.cancelSuccess: Your Brand Name request has been cancelled.
pending.empty: You don't have any Brand Name requests yet.

rejected.title: Your Brand Name request was rejected
rejected.tipText: Try a more distinct version of your brand name, or contact support if you believe this was rejected in error. You can submit a new request right away.
rejected.applyNewButton: Apply for a new Brand Name

approved.title: Your Brand Name request has been approved!
approved.brandMeta: Approved Brand Name · {{count}} callers requested · {{tier}} tier
approved.paymentSubtitle: Choose how you'd like to complete payment to activate your Brand Name Call service.

super_app.title: telebirr Super App
super_app.desc: Pay directly using your telebirr Super App wallet balance.

partner_app.title: telebirr Partner App
partner_app.desc: Pay using a connected bank or partner application via telebirr.

approved.termError: You must accept the Terms & Conditions to continue

confirmModal.title: Confirm payment
confirmModal.message: Please confirm the payment details before proceeding.

emptyState.title: You haven't registered a Brand Name yet
emptyState.description: Your request for a Brand Name Call is not yet available. Register your company's brand name as your Caller ID so your customers instantly recognize your calls and trust them.

showName.title: Show your company name
showName.desc: Customers see your brand instead of a plain number when you call.

trust.title: Build instant trust
trust.desc: Branded calls are far more likely to be answered and trusted.

link.title: Link up to 1,000 numbers
link.desc: Apply your brand across your whole sales or support team.
